article.title: Charter launches low-latency broadband in multiple markets
article.summary: Targeting apps such as online gaming and improved video calls, Charter Communications has launched a L4S-based low-latency capability in Dallas-Fort Worth, Texas; Reno, Nevada, Rochester, Minnesota, and St. Louis, Missouri. #pressrelease
article.title_zh: Charter在多個市場推出低延遲寬頻服務
article.summary_zh: Charter Communications針對線上遊戲和改善視訊通話等應用，在達拉斯-沃斯堡、雷諾、羅徹斯特和聖路易斯等地推出基於L4S的低延遲寬頻服務。

article.title: Former OpenAI Staffers Warn That xAI’s Poor Safety Record Could Complicate SpaceX’s IPO
article.summary: The ex-employees, who cofounded a new AI watchdog group, say investors deserve more information about xAI’s safety practices before SpaceX goes public.
article.title_zh: 前 OpenAI 員工警告 xAI 的安全記錄不佳可能會複雜化 SpaceX 的 IPO
article.summary_zh: 這些共同創辦了新 AI 監管團體的前員工表示，投資者應在 SpaceX 上市前獲得更多有關 xAI 安全實踐的資訊。

article.title: Anthropic enhances Claude Managed Agents with two new privacy and security features
article.summary: Anthropic is introducing two new features for Claude Managed Agents that give users more control over the security and privacy. more…
article.title_zh: Anthropic 使用兩項新隱私和安全功能增強 Claude Managed Agents
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 為 Claude Managed Agents 推出兩項新功能，讓使用者能更好地控制安全和隱私。

article.title: Google to Unveil New AI and Search Features at Developers Conference
article.title_zh: Google 將在開發者大會上推出新 AI 和搜尋功能

article.title: Apple Watch Ultra 4 will be completely redesigned, new rumor claims
article.summary: According to a new rumor, the Apple Watch Ultra 4 will be completely redesigned. This would be the first time Apple changed the design of its most expensive smartwatch since the original Apple Watch Ultra launched back in 2022. Unfortunately, no details about what the Watch Ultra 4 would look like have actually been outed, we are just to expect a big change. The device will also come with a "significant upgrade to sensing functions", the same source claims. It's unclear if this means that new sensors will be added, or the Watch Ultra 4 will still have the same types of sensors as the Watch...
article.title_zh: 傳聞稱 Apple Watch Ultra 4 將進行完全重新設計
article.summary_zh: 根據最新傳聞，Apple Watch Ultra 4 將迎來完全重新設計，這將是自 2022 年原款 Apple Watch Ultra 推出以來首次改變這款高端智慧手錶的外觀設計。

article.title: Anthropic has acquired the dev tools startup used by OpenAI, Google, and Cloudflare
article.summary: Stainless, a New York-based startup, founded in 2022, rose to prominence in the emerging AI industry for automating the creation and maintenance of software development kits, or SDKs — the libraries developers use to interact with APIs.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 收購了被 OpenAI、Google 和 Cloudflare 使用的開發工具初創公司
article.summary_zh: 成立於 2022 年的紐約初創公司 Stainless 因自動化 SDK（軟體開發套件）的創建和維護而在新興 AI 產業中嶄露頭角。

article.title: Google, Blackstone to Create AI Cloud Firm With In-House Chips
article.summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google agreed to create an artificial intelligence cloud business with Blackstone Inc., aiming to compete with companies like CoreWeave Inc. in a burgeoning market.
article.title_zh: Google、Blackstone 創建配備內部芯片的 AI 雲端公司
article.summary_zh: Alphabet Inc. 的 Google 同意與 Blackstone Inc. 創建人工智能雲端業務，以與 CoreWeave Inc. 等公司競爭，該市場正蓬勃發展。

article.title: Nvidia’s CEO Sees China Opening Market to AI Chips From US
article.summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang, speaking days after he joined President Donald Trump’s summit in China, said he expects Chinese authorities to eventually allow the import of artificial intelligence chips from the US.
article.title_zh: Nvidia 首席執行官看好中國開放市場進口美國 AI 芯片
article.summary_zh: Nvidia Corp. 首席執行官黃仁勳在與特朗普總統參加中國峰會後數天發言時表示，他預期中國當局最終將允許從美國進口人工智能芯片。

article.title: Apple Sports app launches World Cup support, expands availability worldwide
article.summary: Apple’s Sports app was just updated to version 4.0, adding new features for the upcoming World Cup and expanding the app’s availability worldwide. Here’s what’s new. more…
article.title_zh: Apple Sports 應用推出世界盃支持，全球擴展可用範圍
article.summary_zh: Apple Sports 應用更新至 4.0 版本，新增即將舉行的世界盃功能並擴展全球可用性。

article.title: Meta Bets $200 Billion It Can Show Massive AI Data Center Will Pay Off
article.summary: Investors want to see whether the company’s huge facility in rural Louisiana is worth the cost
article.title_zh: Meta 投入 2,000 億美元賭注能證明大規模 AI 數據中心值得投資
article.summary_zh: 投資者想看公司在鄉村路易斯安那州的龐大設施是否值得其成本。

article.title: 洛克威爾自動化推出全新馬達控制與電源連線，擴展 EtherNet/IP In-cabinet 解決方案應用
article.summary: 洛克威爾自動化（Rockwell Automation, Inc.）為全球工業自動化與數位轉型領導廠商，今日宣 […]
article.title_zh: 洛克威爾自動化推出全新馬達控制與電源連線，擴展 EtherNet/IP In-cabinet 解決方案應用
article.summary_zh: 洛克威爾自動化（Rockwell Automation, Inc.）為全球工業自動化與數位轉型領導廠商，今日宣 […]

article.title: Intel's Project Firefly creates sub-$600 laptops to compete with Apple's MacBook Neo — leverages China's smartphone manufacturing blueprint to produce affordable Wildcat Lake systems
article.summary: Intel China has unveiled Project Firefly, which borrows a page from China's smartphone supply chain to produce budget-friendly laptops that leverage Wildcat Lake processors.
article.title_zh: Intel Project Firefly創造低於600美元筆記本與Apple MacBook Neo競爭——借鑑中國智慧型手機製造藍圖生產經濟型Wildcat Lake系統
article.summary_zh: Intel中國推出Project Firefly，參考中國智慧型手機供應鏈，以生產搭載Wildcat Lake處理器的經濟型筆記本。
